cc @getsentry/team-javascript-sdks

## SDK Changes Detected

The following PRs were merged to `getsentry/sentry-javascript` in the last 7 days that may affect the `sentry-node-sdk` skill:

- getsentry/sentry-javascript#99999 — feat(node): add new `maxQueueSize` init option (https://github.com/getsentry/sentry-javascript/pull/99999)

## Potential Skill Gaps

1. **Missing config option**: The new `maxQueueSize` option is not documented in the Configuration Reference table of `skills/sentry-node-sdk/SKILL.md`.

## Why This Needs Review

This is a small mechanical addition — adding one row to the config table.

## Skill Files to Review

- `skills/sentry-node-sdk/SKILL.md`

## Priority

LOW
